attacking_style: Pure sprinter who excels in chaotic, disorganized finishes within final 200m. Demonstrates exceptional ability to salvage results from compromised positioning, often launching from 100-150m when leadout fractures or positioning is poor.
team_tactics: Heavily reliant on VAN POPPEL/MØRKØV leadout delivery inside 200m mark. Team struggles with positioning fragility in technical finales and compressed corners. When leadout disintegrates, shows superior individual ability to freelance and find wheels opportunistically.
terrain_preference: Pure flat sprints with technical, chaotic finales suit him best. Severely exposed on any gradient, even minor Cat 3-4 climbs or uphill drags within 30km of finish. Crosswinds and echelon stages show vulnerability when teams apply pressure on climbs before intermediate sprints.
vulnerability: Dropped consistently on lumpy approaches and uphill finishes despite perfect leadouts. Positioning becomes fragile in compressed technical corners around 1200-500m to go. Green jersey competitions vulnerable when rivals use climbing domestiques to pressure before intermediate sprints. Tour-Vuelta doubles show sprint speed degradation.
key_patterns: VAN POPPEL/MØRKØV leadout inside 200m crucial for success—14+ observations show dependence on timing precision
Wins from chaos/poor position repeatedly—salvaged results when leadout fractures in 8+ finales
Dropped on Cat 3-4 climbs targeting green jersey defense—5+ observations confirm climbing limitations
Superior closing speed final 25-100m when positioned correctly—beats faster starters consistently
Boxed in technical corners 500-1200m despite positioning efforts—systematic vulnerability under compression
Intermediate sprint tactical discipline for green jersey micro-management—contested mountain stage sprints for 2-point gaps
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 shows major concerns—climbed off early at Brugge-De Panne, positioning fragility in Paris-Nice technical finales, leadout timing issues persist. Contrast with strong 2022 Vuelta and 2020-2021 peak suggests decline from career-best form.
